_comment: A2A message envelope test vectors. Keys are generated dynamically in tests (see a2a-vectors.test.ts). This file captures the canonical format specification.

canonical_format.description: Canonical bytes for signing: 6 newline-separated fields

vectors.description: Simple application/json ping from alice to bob
vectors.note: signature not fixed — depends on keyset. Verify by signing canonical_bytes with any Ed25519 key and verifying with the corresponding pubkey.

vectors.description: Broadcast text/plain message from carol to * (all agents)
vectors.note: Broadcast to '*' is a convention; routing logic is up to the transport layer.

security_notes.nonce: Must be unique per sender per timestamp window (≥16 bytes of randomness)
security_notes.timestamp: Receivers SHOULD reject messages with timestamp_ms outside [now-5min, now+1min]
security_notes.key_registration: Sender must register their pubkey via POST /api/v1/agents/keys before messages can be verified
security_notes.replay_protection: The nonce is stored on receipt; duplicate nonces are rejected
